channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Well-known pilot Chuck Coleman killed in air show crash in Las Cruces
item.description: He performed at hundreds of air shows and had provided more than 3,000 rides in aerobatic aircraft, the City of Las Cruces added.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, NewsNation

item.title: Bad state data may misdirect nearly $1 billion in federal funds to replace lead pipes
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The Environmental Protection Agency is at risk of misallocating nearly $1 billion in lead pipe replacement funding to the wrong states because it didn’t verify inaccurate data provided by Texas and Florida, an agency watchdog announced.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL PHILLIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pilot Chuck Coleman killed in air show crash in Las Cruces
item.description: Coleman was an aerobatic flight instructor for actors in the 2022 motion picture, "Top Gun: Maverick," where he flew more than 100 flights preparing actors to fly in Navy F-18 Hornets.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, KRON4

item.title: Carville lists 3 reasons why he thinks Harris will win
item.description: “The biggest reason Mr. Trump will lose is that the whole Republican Party has been on a losing streak since Mr. Trump took it over,” he said in an essay published Wednesday by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Suspected drunken driver arrested after passing Harris' motorcade the wrong way in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — A suspected drunken driver heading the wrong way passed within feet of Vice President Kamala Harris' motorcade following a campaign stop this week in Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Video: Suspected drunken driver passes within feet of Harris' motorcade in Wisconsin
item.description: The driver was traveling in the wrong direction on the interstate in Milwaukee when deputies spotted him.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump praised 'Hitler's generals': former chief of staff says
item.description: Retired Gen. John Kelly, who served as White House chief of staff in the Trump administration, said former President Trump praised Adolf Hitler's generals for their loyalty in a new interview in The Atlantic on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KTLA 5

item.title: Suspect in shootings of Democratic office in Arizona had over 200 guns in his home, officials find
item.description: An Arizona prosecutor says the man arrested in the three-time shooting of a Democratic campaign office had more than 200 guns and over 250,000 rounds of ammunition in his home.
item.dc:creator: Anita Snow And Walter Berry, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Despite E. coli outbreak, McDonald's says customers should feel confident eating at chain
item.description: McDonald’s U.S. President Joe Erlinger said in an interview on the “Today” show that the company has removed the Quarter Pounder from its menu in the 10 states where dozens of people were sickened, as well as in several other states.
item.dc:creator: Dee-Ann Durbin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Surfer dies after being struck, impaled by swordfish
item.description: A longtime surfer and travel guide died after being impaled by a swordfish off the coast of Indonesia.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers phenom Fernando Valenzuela dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Yelp turns off comments on the McDonald's that Trump worked at after fake reviews
item.description: Yelp recently paused reviews on a McDonald's in Pennsylvania after former President Trump served pre-screened customers at the location Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Court upholds freedom for woman whose conviction was overturned after 43 years behind bars
item.description: An appellate court in Missouri ruled Tuesday that a lower court was right when it decided to overturn the murder conviction of a woman who spent 43 years behind bars for a killing that her attorneys argue was committed by a discredited police officer.
item.dc:creator: HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Missouri woman finds trunk full of stolen campaign signs with help of Apple AirTag
item.description: "I expected to find the AirTag, but not 59 signs. It was kind of like finding a dead body," the Missouri woman said.
item.dc:creator: Parker Padgett, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Want to be a Power Ranger? Original costumes, props up for auction
item.description: It's been over 30 years since the original Mighty Morphin Power Rangers television series aired in the United States, and for the kids who grew up watching the Power Rangers fight evil in Angel Grove, California, their chance to become one of them is now closer than ever.
item.dc:creator: Marco Rosas, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio man charged with bringing massive 'Trump' sign to Capitol for rioters to use as a weapon
item.description: An Ohio man was arrested Tuesday on charges that he brought a massive “Trump” sign to the U.S. Capitol and joined other rioters in using it as a weapon against police officers during a mob attack.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These are the 'rattiest' cities in the US, according to Orkin's 2024 report
item.description: Chicago — which was briefly attached to a rat-shaped hole in a sidewalk this year — took the top spot again, marking a decade of ratty dominance.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina county surrounding Asheville overcounted Helene deaths by as many as 30, sheriff says
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — The North Carolina county that is home to Asheville overcounted deaths caused by Helene by as many as 30, according to a statement Tuesday from its sheriff’s office and data from the state, significantly reducing the death toll from the historic storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump selling 'MAGADonald's' shirts after drive-thru appearance
item.description: After Trump’s visit to the Bucks County franchise, McDonald’s sought to emphasize its political neutrality and said it does not endorse political candidates.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, ABC 4

item.title: Judge orders Giuliani to hand over assets to Georgia election workers
item.description: Rudy Giuliani must turn over much of his property — his apartment in New York, the city that made him mayor, and other prized possessions — to two Georgia election workers who have sought for months to collect their massive defamation judgment, a federal judge ruled Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KRON4

item.title: Mike Jeffries, former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO, arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Michael Jeffries and two other men have been arrested on sex trafficking and interstate prostitution charges, a spokesperson for federal prosecutors said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Disgraced Hollywood producer Harvey Weinstein diagnosed with bone cancer: Reports
item.description: Disgraced movie producer Harvey Weinstein has been diagnosed with bone cancer, according to reports. The infamous Hollywood mogul’s diagnosis of chronic myeloid leukemia was first reported by NBC News on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Asian American boba brand finds opportunity after Simu Liu sparks cultural appropriation debate
item.description: Olivia Chen and Pauline Ang, friends and business partners on boba milk tea brand Twrl, have tried three times to get on “Shark Tank,” the ABC reality show where up-and-coming entrepreneurs try to woo big-name backers.
item.dc:creator: TERRY TANG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Helicopter crashes into radio tower in Houston, killing 4
item.description: Officials said no one on the ground was injured, and no nearby homes were damaged, though some vehicles were.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Central Park Five sue Trump for defamation over debate comments
item.description: The exonerated Central Park Five sued former President Donald Trump for defamation on Monday over his comments at the recent presidential debate about their wrongful convictions for rape and assault.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, ABC 4

item.title: Zenni Optical offering free glasses for those affected by Hurricane Helene, Milton
item.description: Zenni Optical, a Nothern California company that sells prescription glasses online, is offering free glasses for those impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Prosecutors: Ex-officer's gunshots put people in danger the night of deadly Breonna Taylor raid
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — The 10 shots Brett Hankison fired into Breonna Taylor 's apartment the night she was killed in a police raid put Taylor, her neighbors and even one of Hankison’s fellow Louisville police officers in danger, federal prosecutors argued Monday.
item.dc:creator: DYLAN LOVAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Some Jewish voters in presidential swing states reconsider their longtime devotion to Democrats
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — For Rona Kaufman, the signs are everywhere that more Jews feel abandoned by the Democratic Party and may vote for Republican Donald Trump. It's in her Facebook feed.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Walmart and Aldi are once again offering meal deals for Thanksgiving
item.description: The two companies are advertising their dinners at "inflation-free" or "pre-inflation" prices, respectively.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Giant Pumpkin Regatta makes a splash
item.description: Paddlers dressed in their Halloween best raced in carved-out pumpkins with all their might as part of the West Coast Giant Pumpkin Regatta.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Deml, Fox 5

item.title: Central Park Five sue Trump for defamation over debate comments
item.description: The exonerated Central Park Five sued former President Donald Trump for defamation on Monday over his comments at the recent presidential debate about their wrongful convictions for rape and assault.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How does abortion translate? Ballot measures are a challenge for interpreters
item.description: Reproductive rights measures are on the ballots in 10 states after heated debates over how to describe their impact on abortion — and that's just in English. In 388 places across the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL WARREN, GEOFF MULVIHILL and PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Still using 'LOL'? That could mean you are getting old
item.description: As time has seen several follow-up iterations, including ROFL and LMAO, the original "laugh out loud" acronym is a telltale sign that who you are talking to may be a millennial.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 2 Navy aviators declared dead after fighter jet crash
item.description: The aviators' names won’t be released until a day after their next of kin have been notified, the Navy said in a statement Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Missing teen kayaker found clinging to kayak off Waikiki
item.description: "I think he was in total shock because he wasn't emotional at all. I was actually crying my guts off because he was okay.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Napuunoa, WGN 9
